title: dupatya meridensis
intro: Dupatya meridensis, also known as Wild Tansy or Sweet Golden Rod, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Dupatya meridensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dupatya meridensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
